content:
# Strategy

## Goal
Formalize the relative base-change theory of Altman‚ÄďKleiman, *Compactifying
the Picard Scheme* (Adv. Math. 35, 1980), ¬ß1: the relative Ext sheaf
`H(I,F)` and its local-freeness criterion (Thm 1.3), and the **property of
exchange** for local Ext's culminating in the finiteness/flatness theorem
(Thm 1.9‚Äď1.10). These are the foundation the rest of the paper builds on.
Long arc: the paper's main representability theorems for the compactified
relative Picard functor (Pic^őł 6.3, Pic^{-őł} 6.6) and the ¬ß8 integral-curve
results ‚ÄĒ out of scope for now (see Phases).

## Phases & estimations
| Phase | Status | Iters left | LOC | Key Mathlib needs | Risks |
|-------|--------|-----------|-----|-------------------|-------|
| P1b-iii(b) relExt + exchange (1.8/1.9) ‚Üí close 1.10 `ext_finite_flat` | ACTIVE @041 (brick 1 = internal hom) | 8‚Äď16 | ~300‚Äď700 | **Build, bottom-up (Mathlib gradient):** (1) internal hom `‚Ąčom_{ūĚí™_X}(I,-) : X.Modules ‚•§ X.Modules` (ABSENT ‚ÄĒ first brick, `mathlib-build`); (2) `relExt` real = `R^q(‚Ąčom(I,-) ‚čô f_*)` (reuse `SheafOfModules.pushforward` [EXISTS] + derived-cat setup of `extGroup`); (3) `IsLFPAndFlatOn` real (LFP via `External.ext_coherent_fp`, flat); (4) `extBaseChangeMap` `b^q` (1.8, needs fibre products `X_T`); (5) `exchange` (1.9, anchored Nakayama+half-exact); (6) close 1.10. Openness conjunct already closed (`External.ext_vanishing_open`) | huge; internal-hom + R^q f_* + base-change map absent from Mathlib; brick 1 may itself be a multi-iter from-scratch layer ‚Üí reassess build-vs-anchor after the feasibility report |
| P2 ¬ß2 strong quasi-projectivity & Quot^ő¶ finiteness | DEFERRED | ‚ÄĒ | ‚ÄĒ | Quot scheme, Hilbert scheme | Quot scheme not in Mathlib |
| P3 ¬ß3 rank-1 torsion-free sheaves on integral schemes | DEFERRED | ‚ÄĒ | ‚ÄĒ | torsion-free sheaves, pure dim 1 | depends on P2 |
| P4 ¬ß4‚Äď6 Lin Syst, Spl, representability Pic^őł/Pic^{-őł} | DEFERRED | ‚ÄĒ | ‚ÄĒ | rep'ility, P(E), Cohen‚ÄďMacaulay | depends on P1‚ÄďP3 |
| P5 ¬ß7‚Äď8 algebraic spaces, Artin rep, integral-curve Pic + Abel map | DEFERRED | ‚ÄĒ | ‚ÄĒ | algebraic spaces, Artin's theorem | Artin rep'ility not in Mathlib |

## Completed
| Phase | Iters (done@ ¬∑ used) | LOC | Files | Key results | Reusable techniques | Pitfalls |
|-------|---------------------|-----|-------|-------------|---------------------|----------|
| dag + autoformalize (¬ß1 scaffold) | 003 ¬∑ 3 | ~300 | Basic.lean, _Basic.tex (26 nodes) | 6 `External.*` EGA/OB axioms; 9 ¬ß1 strand decls; `H`/`h` defs; full faithful blueprint w/ verbatim quotes | zero-object `Nonempty`+`noncomputable opaque` to declare module-cat placeholders | opaque stubs have no constructor ‚áí conclusions unprovable until real defs |
| P1a corepresentability one-liners | 004 ¬∑ 1 | ~6 | Basic.lean | `h`, `H_represents` closed (corepr API); `ext_finite_flat` openness conjunct | `coreprx`/`coreprW`/`coreprX` off `IsCorepresentable` from `External.H_existence` | `private` did NOT drop helpers from leandag `unmatched` (cosmetic only) |
| P1b-i foundational defs real | 005 ¬∑ 1 | ~40 | Basic.lean | `IsLFP`,`IsFreeMod`,`IsSFlat`,`tensorMod`,`IsInvertibleMod` all real, axiom-clean | `X.Modules‚Č°SheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf` defeq; tensor=`tensorObj`+sheafify; stalk-flat needs explicit `(R:=X.presheaf)(M:=M.val)` letI | `CommRingCat` stalk-module instance does NOT auto-synthesize |
| P1b-i‚Ä≤ `tensorBaseChangeFunctor` real | 006 ¬∑ 1 | ~30 | Basic.lean | `tensorBaseChangeFunctor`=`pullback f ‚čô tensorLeft F`; new `tensorLeft` endofunctor; removed `instNonemptyModulesFunctor` | hand-built functor from `tensorObj/tensorHom`+sheafify; close laws via `congrArg G.map h |>.trans (G.map_id/_comp)` | `‚čô`-composing across sheafify boundary breaks `IsLocallyInjective` TC synth; `rw` via `id_val/comp_val` fails (X.Modules‚Č†SheafOfModules instance syntactically) |
| P1b-iii(a) realize 5 tractable opaque ¬ß1 Props | 011 ¬∑ 3 (010‚Äď011; 009 died API500) | ~80 | Basic.lean | `IsRetrocompact`,`IsLocallyFreeOfFiniteRankOn`,`IsHalfExact` (@010); `extGroup`,`sheafCohomology` (@011) ‚ÄĒ all opaque‚Üídef, axiom-clean | `extGroup` via relax sig `Ab.{u}`‚Üí`Ab.{u+1}` + `letI HasDerivedCategory.standard`+`hasExt_of_hasDerivedCategory`+`AddCommGrpCat.of(Abelian.Ext)`; `IsHalfExact` via instance-implicit `‚ąÄ[T.Additive]` | `inferInstance HasExt` times out (HasSmallLocalizedHom)‚Üíuse explicit letI; `IsGrothendieckAbelian(SheafOfModules R)` brick AVOIDED via universe relax; `AddCommGrpCat.of` not `AddCommGrp.of` |
| P1b-ii‚Ä≤ affine bridge + **1.4** `exists_free_resolution_step` (first ¬ß1 deep-theorem closure) | 017 ¬∑ 6 (012‚Äď017) | ~120 | Basic.lean, _Basic.tex | tilde bridge `tilde_free/_exact/_isFP`+`fp_sheaf_affine_tilde` (@012‚Äď015); 1.4 assembled @016, closed @017 (sorry 7‚Üí5, `#print axioms`=no sorryAx). 6 `External.*` anchors (affine_fp_tilde, tilde_isFP, descent_noetherian, flat_pullback_exact, pullback_isFreeMod/isLFP) | anchor-and-close: transcribe the paper's EGA/Stacks-cited inputs as `External.*`, assemble; `ShortComplex.exact_kernel` for module SES; ascribe `(tilde M : (Spec R).Modules)` to dodge universe mismatch | from-scratch Mathlib builds (ess-surj, structure-sheaf pullback `p*ūĚí™‚ČÖūĚí™`, fp-globalization) all ended ANCHORED after multi-iter attempts ‚ÄĒ don't retry; anchor cited inputs instead |
| P1b-ii‚Ä≥ **1.2 `exists_acyclic_surjection`** (2nd ¬ß1 deep-thm closed) | 022 ¬∑ 1 | ~30 | Basic.lean, _Basic.tex | closed via anchor-and-assemble: 2 anchors (`External.exists_extensionByZero_surjection`, `External.extensionByZero_coprod_acyclic`, verbatim AK ¬ß1 (1.2)) + 3-line assembly; preceded by 019‚Äď021 `j_!`/`j^*` build (`extensionByZero`‚ä£`restrictFunctor`, j^* exact, j_! exactness reduced) kept off-path | shared private abbrev `extensionByZeroCoprod` makes witness‚ÜĒgoal match by defeq; anchor genuine non-¬ß1 inputs not the ¬ß1 thm | the bottom-up `j_!`-exactness build (019‚Äď021) receded into absent-Mathlib (presheaf-pullback Lan formula; `Adjunction.derived` derivability) ‚ÄĒ anchor-and-assemble was the right pivot, don't grind reductions |
| P1b-iii(b)-prep realize `FiberExtVanishes` (strand-(b) def layer) | 018 ¬∑ 1 | ~6 | Basic.lean | `FiberExtVanishes` opaque‚Üíreal `def` `IsZero (extGroup q (j^*I) (j^*F))` on the scheme fibre, axiom-clean | Mathlib `Scheme.Hom.fiber`/`fiberőĻ` (fibre+inclusion) + `Scheme.Modules.pullback` + `extGroup`; `(s:S)` auto-coerces to `‚Ü•S` point for `f.fiberőĻ s` | `relExt`/`IsLFPAndFlatOn` stay opaque ‚ÄĒ need internal $\sExt$-sheaf (no `internalHom` for SheafOfModules; overlaps PAUSED monoidal) **and** $R^q f_*$ (uninstantiated); both confirmed absent |
| P1b-ii **1.1.2 `H_tensor_invertible`** (4th ¬ß1 deep-thm) + monoidal-naturality layer | 034 ¬∑ 4 (031‚Äď034) | ~330 | Basic.lean, _Basic.tex | Closed via the hand-built monoidal-naturality layer: anchored `External.sheafifyTensorComparison{,Left}` (re-typed object‚ÜíNatIso, net axiom UNCHANGED) ‚áí `tensorAssoc{,NatIso‚āĀ,‚āā,‚āÉ}`, `tensorBraidingNatIso`, unitor NatIsos, `tensorRight{,MapIso}`, `tensorRearrangeNatIso`, `tensorRightEquivOfInvertible` (`‚ąí‚äóL` an equivalence from invertibility), `homTensorFunctorTwistIso`; closed by `coyoneda.preimageIso` reflection. Supersedes the abandoned `MonoidalClosed` route (P1b-i‚Ä≥) | **3-NatIso decomposition** (one leg/assoc-step; leg naturality = anchor's `NatTrans.naturality`, morphism EXPLICIT + objects abstract via generic `*_map_eq` simp set; sheafify-of-id legs via `convert‚Ä¶using 4`); invertible‚Üíequivalence by hand (`Equivalence.mk`, no triangle); coyoneda preimageIso to reflect | `rw`/`simp`/`reassoc_of%`/`slice_lhs` silently fail on sheafification `‚Čę` (non-syntactic instance path) ‚áí term-mode `Eq.trans` chain; `whisker_exchange` not `tensorHom_comp_tensorHom`; fixed slots as `tensorHom(ūĚüô)(ūĚüô)` not `ūĚüô(tensorObj)`; full `MonoidalCategory X.Modules` instance REJECTED (coherence cost) |
| P1b-ii(b) **1.1.3 `H_tensor`** (5th ¬ß1 deep-thm; `H(I,F)‚äóN ‚ČÖ H(I‚äó_S N,F)`, AK p.55) | 040 ¬∑ 6 (035‚Äď040) | ~250 | Basic.lean, _Basic.tex | canonical map őł `htensorComparison` (corepr-reflection of `h(I,F)‚äóid` via tensorAssoc + f^*-comparison); őł iso by Eilenberg‚ÄďWatts. Re-signed `hN:qcoh` (non-qcoh N false). 4 new anchors: `pullbackTensorComparison`/`pullbackUnit`/`pullback_rightUnitality` (f^* monoidal coherences) + `eilenbergWatts_htensorComparison` (EW propagation, conditional on őł_ūĚí™ iso) + `tensorMod_rightUnitality` (internal right-unitor triangle) | anchor-and-assemble per coherence: each `f^*`/internal-monoidal coherence absent (no `MonoidalCategory X.Modules`) ‚Üí anchor the GENERAL (`M N`-general, H/EW-free) coherence, never the ¬ß1 goal; per-morphism naturality (NOT total functors ‚ÄĒ `‚ąÄJ,Admissible f J F` vacuous); genuine `coreprW` not `Classical.choice` | `rw`/`simp`/`coherence`/`aesop` ALL dead on sheafification `‚Čę` ‚Üí pure term-mode `Eq.trans`/`congrArg`; type naturality legs in `tensorMod` form + `exact` across `tensorBC‚ÜĒtensorMod` defeq boundary; each coherence is a SEPARATE anchor (piecemeal converged in 6 iters, no `MonoidalCategory` instance needed) |
| P1b-iii(b)-fin **1.3 `H_locallyFree_of_ext_vanishing`** (3rd ¬ß1 deep-thm closed) | 030 ¬∑ 8 (023‚Äď030) | ~300 | Basic.lean, _Basic.tex | functor `T = Ext¬Ļ_X(I,F‚äó_S ‚ąí~) : ModuleCat A ‚Üí ModuleCat A` BUILT (hand-built End-action lift `liftAdditiveToModuleCat`); half-exact; `T(k(s))=0` via contravariant Ext-LES diagram chase (`Ext¬Ļ_X(I,j_*j^*F)=0`); `functorT_eq_zero` (`T(M)=0 ‚ąÄM` = homological heart); brick 6 free conclusion BUILT (`homTensorFunctor_tilde_exact`+`H_free_of_functorT_zero` via affine bridge+`Module.free_of_flat_of_isLocalRing`) + EGA reduction ANCHORED; sorry 4‚Üí3, axiom-clean | covariant+contravariant Ext-LES (`Abelian.Ext.{co,contra}variant_sequence_exact‚āĀ/‚āā/‚āÉ`); hand-build A-action lift when no `Functor.Linear`; re-type to `{u}‚Üí{u+1}` to absorb Ext universe; anchor-and-assemble for the EGA reduction (base-change compat of H = paused) | Ext lands `u+1` (universe split); `IsSFlat f I` MISSING from `Admissible` (added to thm sig, faithfulness); @028 false bridge `IsSFlat f I‚üĻIsSFlat(j‚Čęf)(j^*I)` ‚ÄĒ use base-term flatness anchor `flat_fibre_restriction_exact` instead |

## Routes
Single route for P1: transcribe ¬ß1 of the paper bottom-up. The EGA-level
inputs the paper cites (existence of `H` for proper maps [EGA III 7.7.8],
adjunction, Ext-and-limits, descent to Noetherian) are recorded as external
dependency anchors ‚ÄĒ `\mathlibok` where Mathlib genuinely has the result,
otherwise an explicit `\textit{Source: [EGA ...]}` anchor with a cite-and-done
proof note so the ¬ß1 cone has finite effort. Whether to later *build* the
absent EGA infrastructure in Lean vs. assume it is a P2+ strategic question.

**Anchor-realization mechanism (how external anchors become Lean).** Each
`...External.*` anchor will be realized in Lean as an `axiom` (or a `sorry`-ed
declaration) carrying the exact EGA/OB statement, never silently. The loop must:
(i) keep each anchor a faithful transcription of the cited result; (ii) certify
that **no anchor is logically equivalent to, or a restatement of, a claimed ¬ß1
theorem** ‚ÄĒ the anchors are genuine EGA/OB inputs (existence of `H`, affine
acyclicity, descent, adjunction, the [OB] homological lemmas, EGA IV‚āÉ 12.3.4
openness, EGA III‚āā 12.3.3 coherence), not disguised copies of 1.3/1.9/1.10.
Consequence: the ¬ß1 theorems are proved **relative to these EGA/OB axioms**; this
is intentional for Phase 1 and is the honest analogue of the paper citing EGA.

## Open key strategic questions
- Does Mathlib have relative Ext sheaves `Ext^q_{X/S}(I,F)` and proper base
  change at the level ¬ß1 needs? (Likely no ‚ÄĒ coordinates needed.)
- Should the EGA foundational inputs be axiomatized or built? (Defer; P1 cites.)
- **Affine equivalence ess-surj: build or anchor? ‚ÄĒ RESOLVED @015 = ANCHOR** (`External.affine_fp_tilde`,
  Stacks 01IA+01PC). Pre-committed iter-014 reversal fired (3-iter build attempt confirmed it a
  from-scratch multi-iter Mathlib layer). Buildable later / upstreamable ‚ÄĒ kept as a Mathlib gap.
- **1.2 sub-bricks (exactness / Ext-adjunction / base change): build or anchor? ‚ÄĒ RESOLVED @022 = ANCHOR the general inputs, ASSEMBLE 1.2.** The from-scratch build (019‚Äď021) confirmed the `j_!`-exactness brick blocked on an absent presheaf-pullback Lan formula and the Ext-adjunction blocked on absent `Adjunction.derived` derivability ‚ÄĒ a multi-iter from-scratch layer (the `affine_fp_tilde` signal). 1.2 *itself* stays a ¬ß1 theorem (NOT anchored); it is built by composing two anchored GENERAL facts (surjection existence + pullback-of-‚ąź acyclicity), neither equivalent to 1.2 ‚ÄĒ exactly the 1.4 closure pattern. Supersedes the old "1.2 NOT anchorable ‚ÄĒ must build" note.
- **1.3 reductions (local-on-S ‚Üí affine ‚Üí Noeth-local) + A-module structure on Ext: anchor or build? ‚ÄĒ PARTLY RESOLVED @024.** Homological core foundation landed @023 (`External.adjunction` proved, `ext_tensor_halfexact` conditional). @024: flat-tensor SES-preservation = **ANCHOR** `External.flat_tensor_exact` (genuine standard flatness input, parallel to anchored `External.flat_pullback_exact`; stalkwise build confirmed a from-scratch gap @023) ‚áí unconditional half-exactness. Reductions cite EGA O_I/IV_3 ‚Üí **anchor** (like 1.4). A-module structure on Ext^q (to feed `External.halfexact_free : ModuleCat A ‚•§ ModuleCat A`) = **BUILD** via Mathlib gradient: `presheafOfModules_sheafification_additive` ‚Üí `tensorLeft_additive` (@024) ‚Üí functor `T` (@025). **@025 RESOLVED route for the lift:** no Mathlib `Functor.Linear`/`intLinear` path (both source AND target must be A-linear; `AddCommGrpCat` is only ‚Ą§-linear) ‚áí hand-build the End-action lift `liftAdditiveToModuleCat` (a‚Ü¶G(a¬∑ūĚüô_M) ring hom A‚ÜíEnd(GM)). Covariant `Ext^1_X(I,-)` packaging RESOLVED @025 (`covariantExtFunctor` built). **Universe obstruction RESOLVED @026 = RE-TYPE:** `functorT : ModuleCat.{u}‚ÜíModuleCat.{u+1}` (Ext is u+1), so `IsHalfExact`/`External.halfexact_free` re-typed to `{u}‚Üí{u+1}` (faithful ‚ÄĒ OB 2.1 is universe-agnostic, the split is the Ext encoding; both unprotected, no consumers). Rejected the alt (collapse Ext universe via small-hom derived cat) as a deep Mathlib gap (the same reason `extGroup` chose u+1 to dodge `IsGrothendieckAbelian(SheafOfModules R)`). **Brick (iii) `T(k(s))=0`: BUILD (not anchor) @027.** The paper proves it by a degree-0-adjunction diagram chase, NOT a degree-1 derived adjunction; Mathlib HAS the contravariant Ext LES (`Abelian.Ext.contravariant_sequence_exact‚āĀ/‚āā/‚āÉ`), so the homological chase is buildable. **@028 surjectivity bricks (3)/(4a)/(4b) ‚Üí `Ext¬Ļ_X(I,j_*F(s))=0`: BUILD, NO new axiom** ‚ÄĒ the "I S-flat ‚üĻ fibre SES exact" input REUSES the existing `External.flat_pullback_exact` (along `j`, fibre base a field ‚üĻ flatness automatic), and the adjunction-naturality "upgrade" is a NON-issue (the underlying `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction`'s `Adjunction.homEquiv_naturality_left` IS the naturality). **@028 CORRECTION:** the "fibre base a field ‚üĻ flatness automatic" framing was WRONG ‚ÄĒ `flat_pullback_exact`'s flatness slot wanted `IsSFlat (j‚Čęf)(j^*I)`, which the @028 prover proved FALSE (fibre map `j` not flat). **@029 = BUILD `T(k(s))=0` in functorT form, +2 anchors:** `External.flat_fibre_restriction_exact` (CORRECT mechanism ‚ÄĒ base-term flatness `IsSFlat f I` ‚üĻ fibre SES exact, replaces the false `hpullflat`) + `External.fibre_tensor_residue_iso` (brick 5 fibre id `j_*j^*F‚ČÖF‚äó_S k~`, GENERAL EGA); re-sign `ext1_X_pushforward_fibre_vanishes` to `(hI:IsSFlat f I)`; build `functorT_obj_isZero_iff`+`functorT_residue_eq_zero`. **@029 DONE incl. bonus `functorT_eq_zero` (T(M)=0 ‚ąÄM ‚ÄĒ homological heart COMPLETE at Spec A).** **Brick 6 (@030): free conclusion = BUILD** (`homTensorFunctor_tilde_exact` via covariant Ext LES + `flat_tensor_exact`; `H_free_of_functorT_zero` via `H_represents`+affine bridge+`Module.free_of_flat_of_isLocalRing` [in Mathlib]) + **EGA reduction = ANCHOR** (`reduce_H_locallyFree_to_spec_local`+`lfp_free_at_point_locallyFree`+`H_isLFP`; the reduction needs `H` base-change compat = PAUSED 1.1.2/1.1.3, genuine EGA boundary, NO ¬ß1 content ‚ÄĒ the ¬ß1 output `H_free_of_functorT_zero` is its premise). Closes line-1071 sorry.
- **1.1.3 `H_tensor`: which route? ‚ÄĒ RESOLVED + DONE @040** (5th ¬ß1 deep-thm; see Completed row). Route =
  canonical map őł `htensorComparison` (corepr-reflection of `h(I,F)‚äóid`) + őł iso by Eilenberg‚ÄďWatts;
  piecemeal-anchor each absent `f^*`/internal-monoidal coherence (general, H/EW-free), assemble the ¬ß1 iso.
- **`relExt`/1.10: anchor or build? ‚ÄĒ RESOLVED = BUILD (ACTIVE @041, brick 1 = internal hom).**
  Anchoring `IsLFPAndFlatOn` under 1.10's hypotheses would anchor a *restatement of ¬ß1 thm 1.10 itself*
  (AK proves it from exchange 1.8/1.9 + EGA III‚āā 12.3.3, NOT cited whole from EGA) ‚ÄĒ violates anchor
  philosophy; and an opaque def has no usable API, so the ¬ß1 assembly (1.8 `b^q` map, 1.9 exchange) is
  unbuildable until `relExt` is REAL. Honest path: BUILD the foundational layer bottom-up via the Mathlib
  gradient ‚ÄĒ internal hom (brick 1, ABSENT) ‚Üí `R^q(‚Ąčom(I,-)‚čôf_*)` = `relExt` real ‚Üí 1.8/1.9 ‚Üí 1.10 ‚ÄĒ and
  anchor only the genuinely-external EGA/OB inputs AK cites (Nakayama, half-exact-free, 12.3.3, 12.3.4).
  **Brick 1 (internal hom) dispatched @041 `mathlib-build` to also report feasibility; if it confirms a
  from-scratch multi-iter Mathlib layer with no clean path, reassess build-vs-anchor (the affine-ess-surj /
  j_! / monoidal-tensor precedent).** ¬ß¬ß-strand-(a) (all H-theory: 1.1.2/1.1.3/1.2/1.3/1.4) is COMPLETE.
- Final scope: user declined to fix it (iter-001); default = ¬ß1 only for now.

## Mathlib gaps & new material
**Structural finding (iter-004/005): opaque stubs gate the deep thms ‚ÄĒ but the
foundational layer IS buildable.** Conclusions that are `opaque` Props / isos of
`opaque` objects have no constructor, so the gated thms (1.3, 1.9, 1.10 2nd part,
`H`-isos) need each stub made a real def first (mathlib-build), bottom-up.
iter-005 existence-check: Mathlib HAS the foundational pieces (`SheafOfModules`
`.IsFinitePresentation`/`.IsFiniteType`/`.free`; presheaf-monoidal `tensorObj`;
`AlgebraicGeometry.Flat`), so `IsLFP`/`IsFreeMod` are near-direct once the
`X.Modules ‚ÜĒ SheafOfModules` bridge is confirmed. The relExt/base-change layer
remains genuinely absent.

**Key finding (iter-007) ‚ÄĒ monoidal reality (corrects old "no MonoidalCategory"
note):** Mathlib HAS `PresheafOfModules.monoidalCategory` (full associators +
unitors) but has NO `MonoidalCategory (SheafOfModules R)` and registers NO
braided/symmetric instance even at the presheaf level. The generic
`CategoryTheory.Sheaf J A` monoidal/braided/symmetric machinery does NOT apply to
modules-over-a-sheaf-of-rings. ‚áí `tensorMod`'s braiding/associator/unitors must
all be hand-built (P1b-i‚Ä≥). Consequence: 1.1.2/1.1.3 (the only ¬ß1 lemmas whose
proofs are pure tensor-algebra+Yoneda, no relExt/base-change) are gated on that
scaffolding; every other remaining ¬ß1 sorry is gated on a larger absent brick
(real Ext groups, free-presentation, relExt+proper base change).

Gaps to fill:
- **affine bridge ‚ÄĒ COMPLETE @015** (QCoh(Spec A)‚ČÖModuleCat A). tilde free/exact/counit @012‚Äď@013; `fp_sheaf_affine_tilde` @015 via anchor. **Mathlib gap kept open (to build/upstream): affine ess-surj `(tilde.functor R).EssSurj` / `F ‚ČÖ ~őď(F)` for QCoh on affine** (Stacks 01IA) + `~M` fp ‚áĒ M fp (01PC) ‚ÄĒ anchored as `External.affine_fp_tilde` after a 3-iter build attempt confirmed it a from-scratch layer absent from Mathlib v4.30.0 (no `EssSurj`/`essImage` for tilde; `IsFinitePresentation`=LOCAL `QuasicoherentData`). Peer projects: all early-stage stubs, NO reusable infra.
- `tensorMod` associator `(A‚äóB)‚äóC‚ČÖA‚äó(B‚äóC)` (P1b-i‚Ä≥, braiding+unitors DONE): reduces to `sheafifyTensorComparison` `~((~P)‚äóQ)‚ČÖ~(P‚äóQ)`, itself reducing to "`tensorObj` preserves local inj/surj" ‚ÄĒ the one real sub-gap; local SURJ holds, local INJ FALSE (`‚Ą§/2‚äó¬∑2`); recovered only via `MonoidalClosed`/stalks or the localization-monoidal route (`Localization.Monoidal` needs absent `W.IsMonoidal`+`L.IsLocalization W`). **RESOLVED @031 = ANCHOR** `External.sheafifyTensorComparison{,Left}` (the unconditional comparison; module-sheafification monoidal ‚ÄĒ a true general fact, not a ¬ß1 restatement); BUILT unconditional `tensorAssoc` + `tensorRearrange` on top (STEPs 1‚Äď3). Same anchor-and-assemble pivot that closed 1.2/1.4. **@031 EXPOSED the next gap = naturality:** the object-level anchors give no naturality and `X.Modules` has no `MonoidalCategory` instance, so the STEP-4 `homTensorFunctor` twist nat-iso cannot be built directly. **@032 = re-type the comparison anchors to NatIso (net axiom count unchanged) ‚áí natural associator/braiding ‚áí `tensorRearrangeNatIso` + invertible tensor equivalence (built by hand) ‚áí twist iso ‚áí close.** REJECTED building a full `MonoidalCategory X.Modules` instance (pentagon/triangle coherence + tensorMod-defeq refactor: more cost/risk for marginal gain). Conditional `‚Ä¶OfLocallyBijective` infra kept off-path.
- `j_!` extension-by-zero (P1b-ii‚Ä≥, 1.2): `extensionByZero`+`extensionByZeroAdjunction`+colimit-pres BUILT
  @019; `j^*` exact @020; `j_!` exactness reduced @020‚Äď021 to `(PresheafOfModules.pullback ŌÜ.hom).PreservesMonomorphisms`
